prompt: COMPREHEND BURST (Phase 0-2 of the comprehend-visualise skill ONLY — read .claude/skills/comprehend-visualise/SKILL.md first). Target = the cortex codebase at ~/dev/kybernesis/cortex ON THE M4 MINI. Read it READ-ONLY over SSH: prefix every read with `ssh davidcruwys@100.82.235.39 '<cmd>'` (key auth, non-interactive works). DO NOT write anything to the M4 / to cortex. DO NOT pick output shapes. DO NOT render. Produce DATA + a digest, then STOP — shape selection is a human gate Marshall runs with David next; rendering is a later Swagger. STEPS: (1) Capture provenance: `ssh davidcruwys@100.82.235.39 'git -C ~/dev/kybernesis/cortex rev-parse HEAD'` (the commit_sha). (2) Enumerate over SSH: the ~8 packages/modules, the 4+ databases/schemas, key components/entry points, and the main flows. Also `git -C ~/dev/kybernesis/cortex log --since='14 days ago' --oneline` for the change story. (3) FAN OUT parallel readers (sub-agents) — one per package/subsystem — each reading over SSH and returning a CITED mini-digest: what it is, key files (path), deps, data shapes; tag claims verified/inference/unknown. Match fan-out to size; ~8 readers. (4) MERGE into Mochaccino-ready DATA. mkdir -p experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/cortex/ and write data.json there with this shape: { "meta": { "id":"cortex-system", "version":"1.0.0", "extracted":"2026-06-08", "source":"~/dev/kybernesis/cortex @ <commit_sha> (M4)", "prompt":"Comprehend the cortex system for visualisation" }, "system": { "name":"cortex", "summary":"...", "package_count":N, "db_count":M }, "packages": [ { "name":"", "what":"", "key_files":[], "deps":[], "data_shapes":[] } ], "databases": [ { "name":"", "what":"", "tables":[] } ], "flows": [ { "name":"", "steps":[] } ], "history": [ { "sha":"", "summary":"" } ] }. Also write digest.md (the grounded, file-cited narrative). meta.source MUST carry the cortex path + commit_sha (provenance for refresh). (5) STOP and report ONE line: package_count, db_count, commit_sha, and that data.json + digest.md landed under experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/cortex/. Then complete run-next-workflow bookkeeping (run record + move to done/ + reports/ handback).
